VoronoiMap: SVG visualization export with 6 color schemes, CLI integration, scipy+fallback region computation

Interactive HTML visualization — Canvas-based pan/zoom, hover tooltips (region index, seed coords, area, vertex count), live color scheme switching, dark/light theme toggle, responsive layout, zero dependencies

GeoJSON export — standard FeatureCollection for GIS tools (QGIS, Mapbox, Leaflet, Google Earth, ArcGIS), region polygons + seed points, closed rings, custom properties callback, optional CRS, CLI flags (--geojson, --no-seeds, --crs), generate_geojson() one-call, 14 tests

Region statistics & CSV/JSON export — per-region metrics (area, perimeter, centroid, compactness/circularity, vertex count, avg edge length), aggregate summary (mean/median/min/max/std area, coefficient of variation, coverage), CLI flags (--stats, --stats-csv, --stats-json), format_stats_table() text output, generate_stats() one-call, 40 new tests (199 total)

Lloyd relaxation — iterative centroid-based smoothing (Lloyd's algorithm) for uniform Voronoi tessellations. lloyd_relaxation() with full history, convergence tracking, early termination, bounds clamping, callback. generate_relaxed_diagram() one-call. export_relaxation_html() animated HTML viz: play/pause, speed control, step slider, convergence graph, ghost dots, pan/zoom, hover tooltips, 6 color schemes, dark/light theme, keyboard shortcuts (space/arrows/home/end), converged badge. CLI: --relax N for SVG, --relax-animate OUTPUT for animation. 42 new tests (231 total)

Neighbourhood Graph (Delaunay dual) — adjacency extraction from Voronoi regions (scipy Delaunay fast path + polygon-edge fallback). compute_graph_stats() with 14 metrics (degree distribution, density, clustering coefficient, connected components, diameter, avg path length, isolated/leaf nodes). export_graph_json() (nodes with degree/neighbors, edges with lengths, stats), export_graph_csv() (edge list + summary), export_graph_svg() (Voronoi regions + red graph overlay with node markers, optional degree labels, stats legend), format_graph_stats_table() with histogram. generate_graph() one-call. CLI: --graph, --graph-json, --graph-csv, --graph-svg, --graph-labels. Also fixed compute_regions() QhullError fallback for collinear points. 54 new tests (285 total)

Seed Point Generators — 6 distribution algorithms for Voronoi seeds. vormap_seeds.py module: random_uniform (n random points), grid (regular rectangular), hexagonal (honeycomb with alternating row offsets), jittered_grid (grid + per-cell random displacement), poisson_disk (Bridson's O(n) algorithm with background grid for blue-noise minimum-spacing), halton (low-discrepancy quasi-random sequence with configurable bases/skip). All generators: bounding box, seed param, return list[tuple]. save_seeds/load_seeds I/O utilities. Full CLI with subcommands and per-generator options. 60 new tests

Point Pattern Analysis (vormap_pattern.py) - Clark-Evans NNI (R, z-score, p-value), Ripley's K and Besag's L function (multi-scale clustering), quadrat analysis (chi-squared, VMR), mean center, standard distance, convex hull ratio. Combined analysis with majority-vote interpretation. Text report + JSON export. CLI --pattern and --pattern-json. 59 tests.
sauravcode: Interactive REPL with persistent state, multi-line blocks, built-in commands (vars/funcs/clear/history/load), auto-display results

Standard library — 27 built-in functions: string (upper/lower/trim/replace/split/join/contains/starts_with/ends_with/substring/index_of/char_at), math (abs/round/floor/ceil/sqrt/power), utility (type_of/to_string/to_number/input/range/reverse/sort). REPL builtins command, stdlib_demo.srv, 49 new tests

Dictionary/map data type — {key: value} literal syntax, bracket access (read/write), string/number/boolean keys, any value type (including nested maps and lists), 3 new builtins (keys/values/has_key), extended len/type_of/contains/to_string for maps, IndexedAssignmentNode fix, map_demo.srv, 49 new tests (261 total)

String interpolation (f-strings) — f"Hello {name}!" syntax for embedding expressions in strings. FSTRING token, FStringNode AST, parse_fstring() with recursive expression parsing, {{ and }} escaping, auto-type-conversion (numbers/bools/lists/maps), works in assignments/print/functions/control flow/REPL, fstring_demo.srv, 48 new tests (370 total)

Error handling (try/catch/throw) — structured exception handling. TryCatchNode/ThrowNode AST, ThrowSignal exception class, try/catch blocks catch both user-thrown errors and runtime errors (division by zero, index out of bounds, undefined vars, key not found), catch binds error message to named variable, throw accepts any expression (strings, numbers, f-strings), nested try/catch with re-throw, works inside functions (scope properly restored via finally), works with all control flow (if/while/for), try/catch with return for safe error-returning patterns, uncaught throws display error and exit, REPL support, try_catch_demo.srv, 48 new tests (420 total)

Lambda expressions — anonymous functions with closure support. Syntax: lambda x -> x * 2, lambda x y -> x + y. ARROW token, LambdaNode AST, LambdaValue runtime object with closure capture. Works with all higher-order functions (map, filter, reduce, each). Closures capture variables at definition time. type_of returns 'lambda'. 34 new tests (516 total)

Module Import System: import statement for .srv modules. String or identifier syntax. Auto .srv extension, relative path resolution, circular import detection, diamond dependency handling. ImportNode AST + parse_import + execute_import. 31 new tests.

List Comprehensions � [expr for var in iterable if cond] syntax for concise list transformations. ListComprehensionNode AST, parser detects for-keyword in list literal, interpreter with scope safety (no var leak), works with range/builtins/functions/lambdas/strings/maps/try-catch. 48 new tests (595 total).

Session Tags — session_tags DB table, tag validation (validateTag/validateTags), 6 REST endpoints (GET/POST/DELETE tags, list all tags, by-tag filtering, tag query param on session list), 5 SDK methods (add_tags, remove_tags, get_tags, list_all_tags, list_sessions_by_tag), cached prepared statements, 20 tag limit per session. 26 backend tests, 21 SDK tests. 185 backend total, 140 SDK total.

Data Retention & Cleanup — retention_config table, GET/PUT /retention/config (max_age_days, max_sessions, exempt_tags, auto_purge), GET /retention/stats (session/event counts, age breakdown, status breakdown, eligible-for-purge count), POST /retention/purge (dry-run option, tag-based exemption, cascading deletes). SDK: get_retention_config(), set_retention_config(), get_retention_stats(), purge(dry_run=). 29 backend + 20 SDK = 49 tests. 252 backend total, 187 SDK total.

Shortest Path Finder — BFS (hop-optimal) and Dijkstra (weight-optimal) with interactive node selection, visual highlighting (cyan source, magenta target, yellow path), thick edge strokes, result panel with hop count/weight/edge types

Community Detection — connected component analysis with BFS, community overlay visualization (12 distinct colors, intra-community edges colored, cross-community dimmed), interactive panel with Detect/Clear, per-community metrics (size, edges, density, dominant type, avg weight), modularity score, significant community filtering, 21 new tests

GraphML Export — standard XML graph interchange format for Gephi, Cytoscape, NetworkX, yEd. GraphMLExporter class with full vertex/edge metadata (type, weight, label, type_label), XML character escaping, sorted deterministic output, exportToString()/export(File)/exportVisibleToString(), graph metadata (timestamp, description), auto .graphml extension, overwrite confirmation, Export GraphML button in tool panel, 35 new tests

Node Centrality Analysis — degree centrality (normalized degree), betweenness centrality (Brandes' O(V*E) algorithm), closeness centrality (Wasserman-Faust normalization). Combined score ranking (0.3*degree + 0.4*betweenness + 0.3*closeness), network topology classification (Trivial/Disconnected/Hub-and-Spoke/Distributed/Hierarchical). Interactive panel with Compute/Clear, metric sort dropdown (Combined/Degree/Betweenness/Closeness), top-10 ranking with medals, summary stats. Programmatic API: getResult(), getRankedResults(), getTopNodes(), getTopByMetric(), centrality maps, getSummary(), classifyTopology(). 45 new tests

Articulation Point and Bridge Analyzer - Tarjan's DFS for cut vertices and bridges. Per-AP details (degree, edge types, biconnected components, criticality), per-bridge details (component sizes, severity). Resilience score (0-100), vulnerability classification. Visual highlighting (red-orange nodes/edges). 48 tests.

PageRank Analyzer - Google's link analysis algorithm (power-iteration, configurable damping/tolerance/iterations), dangling node handling, PageRankResult with normalized rank and importance labels, Gini coefficient, Shannon entropy ratio, rank distribution tiers, hidden influencer detection, degree centrality comparison with position shift. Also added JUnit 4.13.2 dependency and testSourceDirectory config to pom.xml. 77 new tests (271->348 total).

ARIA accessible. 35 new tests (232 total).

Multi-Feed Support — Feed Manager for managing multiple RSS sources. Feed model (NSSecureCoding), FeedManager singleton (CRUD, toggle, reorder), FeedListViewController (two-section UI), 10 built-in presets (BBC, NPR, Reuters, TechCrunch, Ars Technica, Hacker News, The Verge), custom feed URLs with validation, multi-feed aggregation with duplicate detection, dynamic nav title, 35 new tests

Read/Unread Tracking — ReadStatusManager singleton (UserDefaults persistence, O(1) Set-based lookup, auto-pruning at 5000 links), auto-mark read on tap/detail navigation, blue dot unread indicator, read story dimming, unread count in nav title, segmented filter (All/Unread/Read with live counts), Mark All Read button with confirmation, swipe-left to toggle read/unread, .readStatusDidChange notifications, 42 new tests

Reading Statistics Dashboard — ReadingStatsManager singleton (timestamped event recording, JSON/UserDefaults persistence, auto-pruning at 10K events), ReadingStatsViewController with scrollable dashboard. Overview cards (total/today/week/month counts, daily average, bookmarks), reading streaks (current + longest, consecutive-day tracking, motivational messages), hourly activity bar chart (24-bar HourlyBarChartView, most active hour), per-feed breakdown (color-coded progress bars, sorted by count), source feed tracking (Story.sourceFeedName, RSSFeedParser attribution). Clear all with confirmation, empty state, auto-refresh via NotificationCenter, 38 new tests

OPML Import/Export — industry-standard OPML 2.0 for feed migration between RSS readers. OPMLImportResult with counts + summary. 42 new tests

Offline Reading — OfflineCacheManager singleton (save/remove/toggle/search/purge, CachedArticle model with NSSecureCoding, 200 article + 10MB limits with auto-eviction, 30-day stale purge, feed filtering, cache summary/utilization stats, formatBytes utility). ai: Simulation runner CLI — 5 strategies (greedy/conservative/random/chain/burst), 5 presets, ASCII worker tree + timeline visualization, JSON export, reproducible seeds, summary stats with depth distribution and denial breakdown
Comparison runner — side-by-side simulation experiments with strategy comparison, preset comparison, parameter sweeps, tabular output with rankings/medals/insights, JSON export

Threat scenario simulator — 9 adversarial attack vectors (depth spoofing, signature tampering, kill switch evasion, quota exhaustion, cooldown bypass, runaway replication, stale worker accumulation, expiration evasion, stop condition bypass). Security score (0-100) with letter grade, threat/defense matrix, per-scenario details with block rates, actionable recommendations, full CLI + programmatic API, JSON export, 33 new tests (115 total)

Interactive HTML report generator — self-contained HTML reports with Canvas charts for simulation (depth distribution bar, replication donut, worker tree, timeline), threat assessment (security score/grade badge, block rate bars, mitigation donut, severity/status badges, progress bars, recommendations), and strategy comparison (multi-metric bars, efficiency chart, metrics table, insights). Combined tabbed view, dark/light theme toggle, collapsible sections, responsive design, zero dependencies. CLI (python -m replication.reporter --all --open), HTMLReporter.save(), 55 new tests (170 total)

Monte Carlo Risk Analyzer — probabilistic safety assessment via randomized simulation batches. MonteCarloAnalyzer.analyze() runs N simulations (default 200) with unique random seeds, computes 8 metric distributions (workers, tasks, depth, efficiency, denial rate, etc.) with percentiles (P5-P99), 95% confidence intervals, risk classification (LOW/MODERATE/ELEVATED/HIGH/CRITICAL), depth+worker histograms. MonteCarloAnalyzer.compare() for side-by-side multi-strategy risk comparison with ranking, medals, insights. Auto-generated recommendations. Full CLI (--runs, --compare, --strategy, --scenario, --json, --summary-only). JSON export. Deterministic mode (randomize_seeds=False). 54 new tests (224 total)

Parameter Sensitivity Analyzer -- OAT (one-at-a-time) parameter sweeps with tipping point detection and impact ranking. SensitivityAnalyzer sweeps 7 parameters (max_depth, max_replicas, cooldown, tasks/worker, replication_probability, cpu_limit, memory_limit) across their full ranges, running N simulations per point. Extracts 9 safety metrics, detects tipping points (>50% relative change), computes range-based impact scores (0-100), ranks parameters by overall safety influence. Actionable recommendations (tuning priorities, threshold warnings, low-impact params). Rich text rendering with tables/bars. Full CLI (--param, --runs, --strategy, --scenario, --json, --summary-only). JSON export. 61 new tests (285 total)

Safety Policy Engine � declarative safety rules for automated simulation validation. PolicyRule (metric + operator + threshold + severity), SafetyPolicy (4 presets: minimal/standard/strict/ci), 12 single-run + 7 Monte Carlo metrics, evaluate() + evaluate_with_mc(), JSON policy file I/O, compliance report with recommendations, CLI with exit codes for CI/CD gating. 81 new tests (366 total).

Forensic Analyzer - post-simulation safety dissection. Event reconstruction with safety annotations, near-miss detection (configurable headroom threshold), escalation phase detection (sliding window), controller decision audit trail, counterfactual what-if analysis (re-runs with modified params), safety scoring (0-100, 5 risk levels), recommendation engine. 7 render methods, full JSON serialization, CLI with all options. 67 new tests (473 total).

Scenario Generator - automated test scenario creation. 4 categories: boundary (parameter extremes), adversarial (attack configs like flood/chain-evasion/resource-exhaustion), random (uniform sampling), gradient (incremental relaxation for tipping points). Interest scoring (0-100, worker/depth ratios, denial rates, efficiency anomalies), risk classification (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW). ScenarioSuite with ranking, filtering, safety summary. Stress test mode. Text reports + JSON. Full CLI. 60 tests.
Vidly: Genre + Rating + Details + Search/Filter — Genre enum (10 genres), Rating (1-5 stars), Details page with star visualization, Index search bar with genre/rating filters, sortable columns, MovieSearchViewModel

Customer Management — enhanced Customer model (email/phone/membership date/tier), ICustomerRepository + InMemoryCustomerRepository (thread-safe CRUD, search, stats), CustomersController (full CRUD + search/filter/sort), 3 views (Index with stats dashboard + search, Details, Edit/Create), 35 new tests

Rental Management — complete checkout/return/late-fee workflow. Rental model (customer/movie refs, auto TotalCost/DaysOverdue/IsOverdue, status auto-refresh), IRentalRepository + InMemoryRentalRepository (ReturnRental with $1.50/day late fee, IsMovieRentedOut, search, overdue, stats), RentalsController (Index with search/filter/sort, Checkout with availability checking, Return with messages, Overdue view), 4 views with stats dashboard, 40 tests

Movie Recommendations — personalized movie suggestions based on rental history. RecommendationService analyzes genre preferences (recency bonus for recent rentals), scores unwatched movies (genre affinity × 2 + rating + 5-star bonus), generates explanatory reasons. RecommendationsController (GET /Recommendations?customerId=X), view with customer dropdown, stats cards (past rentals, genre interests, suggestions, unwatched count), genre preference bar chart, recommendation cards with score badges/star ratings/reasons. 42 new tests

Watchlist — per-customer 'Watch Later' movie list with priority levels (Normal/High/Must Watch), optional notes, and one-click rent-from-watchlist. WatchlistItem model, IWatchlistRepository + InMemoryWatchlistRepository (thread-safe, O(1) duplicate checking via composite key HashSet), WatchlistController (Index/Add/Remove/Clear/UpdatePriority), Index view with customer selector, stats dashboard (4 cards), prioritized table with inline priority buttons, remove/rent actions, clear-all, popular movies section. Add view with filtered dropdowns and tips panel. 57 new tests

Revenue Dashboard — admin overview with KPIs (total revenue, rentals, active, overdue, late fees, avg/rental, customers, movies), Top Movies ranked by rental count with genre/rating/revenue, Top Customers ranked by spending with membership tier and late fees, Revenue by Genre with horizontal bars, Revenue by Membership Tier with unique customer counts, Monthly Revenue (last 6 months with bar viz), Recent Activity (last 10 rentals with status badges). DashboardService with single-pass dictionary aggregation, internal static methods for testability. 47 new tests

Customer Activity Report � per-customer rental history + analytics. CustomerActivityService (summary stats, genre breakdown, monthly activity chart, loyalty score 0-100, actionable insights engine). ActivityController + full-page view with customer selector, 8 KPI cards, genre bar chart, monthly bar chart, insight cards (info/positive/warning), rental history table. 48 new tests.
Ocaml-sample-code: Graph algorithms module — adjacency list (Map.Make functor), BFS/DFS traversal, shortest path, connected components, cycle detection (3-color DFS), topological sort (Kahn's algorithm), directed/undirected support

Priority queue (leftist min-heap) — purely functional persistent heap with merge-based API (insert/find_min/delete_min/merge all O(log n)), heap sort, top-k extraction, bottom-up O(n) construction, custom comparators, ASCII tree visualization, structural validation

Parser combinator library — 15+ composable combinators (satisfy, char_, string_, bind/>>=, map/<$>, <|>/choice, many, many1, sep_by, between, chainl1, chainr1, optional, try_, label). Three example parsers: arithmetic expressions with correct operator precedence (+ - * / ^ parens), integer lists, key-value pairs. AST construction + evaluation. 52 new tests

Trie (prefix tree) — purely functional persistent trie with CharMap (Map.Make functor). insert/member/delete O(m), has_prefix, words_with_prefix (auto-complete), all_words (lexicographic via CharMap), longest_common_prefix, word_count/node_count, of_list, to_string (ASCII viz), deletion with dead-node pruning. 55 new tests

Regular expression engine — Thompson's NFA construction for linear-time matching. Recursive descent parser (regex syntax → AST), NFA compilation with epsilon transitions, epsilon-closure simulation. Supports: . (any char), * + ? (quantifiers), | (alternation), () (grouping), [a-z] (character classes), [^abc] (negation), \d \w \s (shorthands), ^ $ (anchors), \\ escapes. API: compile/matches/find/find_all/replace/split/ast_to_string. 52 new tests

Lazy Streams — infinite/lazy sequences with on-demand evaluation. 46 functions: 11 constructors (unfold, iterate, repeat, cycle, from, range), 12 observers (take/take_while/drop/drop_while/nth/nth_opt), 7 transforms (map/mapi/filter/filter_map/flat_map/scan), 5 combiners (append/interleave/zip/zip_with/unzip), 4 searchers (find/exists/fold/iter). 7 classic infinite streams (nats, fibs, primes, powers_of_2, factorials, triangulars). Pretty printing. 65 new tests

Red-Black Tree — Okasaki-style purely functional self-balancing BST. insert with 4-case balance, delete with bubble rebalancing, member, min/max, cardinal, height, black-height. Set operations: union, intersection, difference, subset, equal. Higher-order: fold, iter, map, filter, partition, for_all, exists. Invariant checker (root-black, no-red-red, uniform black-height, BST ordering). Sequential insert stays balanced (h<=12 for n=50). 70 new tests

Sorting Algorithms — 6 sorts: insertion_sort (stable O(n²)), selection_sort (O(n²) minimal moves), quicksort (median-of-three pivot, 3-way partition), heapsort (functional leftist min-heap), natural_mergesort (run detection + pairwise merge, O(n) on sorted data), counting_sort (O(n+k) integer sort with bounds). Utilities: is_sorted/is_strictly_sorted predicates, partition3, find_runs, timed benchmarking, data generators. 83 new tests

Union-Find (Disjoint Sets) — persistent functional union-find using IntMap with union-by-rank and path compression. create/find/find_root/union/connected (O(log n)), num_components/component_size/component_members/all_components, roots/cardinal/is_single_component, of_unions (bulk construction), kruskal (MST algorithm), would_cycle (cycle detection), to_string. Persistent: old versions remain valid after union. 92 new tests

Functional Hash Map — persistent immutable hash table using separate chaining with auto-resizing. FunMap module: create/insert/find/remove/mem (O(1) amortized), fold/iter/map/mapi/filter/for_all/exists, keys/values/bindings/of_list/to_list, merge/union with conflict resolution, update (Option-based), equal, partition, choose, singleton. Auto-resize at 75% load. Array.copy persistence. Polymorphic keys via Hashtbl.hash. 219-line module, 91 new test assertions.

Bloom Filter — probabilistic set membership with double hashing. create/create_optimal/add/mem (no false negatives), popcount/saturation/false_positive_rate, of_list/mem_all/mem_any, union/clear/copy/to_string. 156-line module, 65 new test assertions.
prompt: Multi-turn Conversation class — persistent message history, configurable per-conversation parameters (temperature/maxTokens/topP/penalties), SendAsync with full context, replay via AddUserMessage/AddAssistantMessage, Clear preserving system prompt, GetHistory export, thread-safe, 28 tests
Conversation serialization — SaveToJson/LoadFromJson + SaveToFileAsync/LoadFromFileAsync, full round-trip (messages + parameters), System.Text.Json, 27 tests

PromptTemplate class — reusable prompts with {{variable}} placeholders, default values, case-insensitive matching, strict/non-strict rendering, variable introspection (GetVariables/GetRequiredVariables), template composition via Compose(), RenderAndSendAsync for direct Azure OpenAI integration, JSON serialization (ToJson/FromJson/SaveToFileAsync/LoadFromFileAsync), 42 tests

PromptChain class — multi-step LLM pipeline where each step's output feeds into subsequent steps as template variables. Fluent builder (AddStep/WithSystemPrompt/WithMaxRetries), RunAsync with ChainResult (FinalResponse, GetOutput, per-step timing), static Validate() for variable satisfaction checking, full JSON serialization (ToJson/FromJson/SaveToFileAsync/LoadFromFileAsync), duplicate output variable detection, 38 new tests

PromptLibrary — central template registry with PromptEntry (name/description/category/tags/timestamps), thread-safe CRUD (Add/Set/Get/TryGet/Update/Remove/Clear), search & filter (FindByCategory/FindByTag/Search across all fields), GetCategories/GetAllTags, Merge with overwrite control, JSON serialization (ToJson/FromJson/SaveToFileAsync/LoadFromFileAsync), CreateDefault() with 8 built-in templates (code-review, explain-code, summarize, translate, extract-json, rewrite, debug-error, generate-tests). Also fixed pre-existing build issues (System.ClientModel 1.8.1, MSTest→xUnit conversion). 89 new tests (396 total)

PromptGuard — prompt safety, quality analysis, and preprocessing. Static utility class with: EstimateTokens() heuristic token counting, DetectInjection()/DetectInjectionPatterns() against 10 attack vectors (instruction override, role hijacking, jailbreak, system prompt extraction, DAN, delimiter injection), CalculateQualityScore() 0-100 scoring (length, specificity, structure, examples, constraints, vague language), Analyze() comprehensive PromptAnalysis (tokens, injection risk, quality grade A-F, warnings, suggestions), Sanitize() for null bytes/control chars/delimiter markers/whitespace normalization, WrapWithFormat() with OutputFormat enum (JSON/NumberedList/BulletList/Table/StepByStep/OneLine/XML/CSV/YAML), CheckTemplate() for template safety inspection, TruncateToTokenLimit() with smart boundary breaking. 84 new tests

TokenBudget — auto-trim conversations to fit model context windows. TokenBudget class: constructor (maxTokens/reserveForResponse), AddMessage with auto-trim, 3 trim strategies (RemoveOldest FIFO, SlidingWindow with KeepFirstTurns, RemoveLongest), system messages always preserved, WouldFit() pre-check, GetMessages/GetMessagesWithTokens snapshots, ClearHistory/ClearAll, GetSummary (BudgetSummary with 15 stats), ForModel factory (15+ models: GPT-4/4o/3.5, Claude 3/3.5/4), ToJson/FromJson serialization, thread-safe, ReserveTokens safety margin. 56 new tests

FewShotBuilder - structured few-shot prompt engineering. 5 formats (Labeled/ChatStyle/Minimal/Numbered/XML), example management (add/remove/shuffle/reorder), label filtering, token-budget-aware building, random selection, system context, custom labels, JSON serialization. 84 new tests.
gif-captcha: Interactive CAPTCHA demo — 10-challenge quiz where users view GIFs, describe unexpected events, then see human/GPT-4 comparison. Progress tracking, skip option, GIF load fallback, results with humanity score and stats

Research analysis dashboard — CAPTCHA taxonomy (6 categories), Canvas bar charts (category distribution + difficulty 2023 vs 2025), radar chart (human vs GPT-4 vs GPT-4o across 6 cognitive dims), multi-model comparison table, AI evolution timeline, 10 expandable per-GIF cards with difficulty meters

CAPTCHA Workshop — create custom GIF CAPTCHA challenge sets with Build (CRUD, categories, difficulty, reorder, sample set), Preview (sequential challenge flow with answer/skip/reveal), Export/Import (JSON copy/download, shareable URL links, file upload, humanAnswer fallback), localStorage auto-save, 53 new tests

AI Response Simulator — interactive model comparison page for 5 AI models (GPT-4, GPT-4V, GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, Gemini 1.5). Per-CAPTCHA simulated responses with side-by-side human comparison, reasoning explanations, 6-dimension capability bars (frame analysis, motion tracking, narrative comprehension, cultural context, humor detection, object recognition), model×CAPTCHA heatmap, stacked effectiveness chart, capability radar overlay, interactive model switching, 42 new tests (186 total)

Temporal Sequence Challenge — event ordering CAPTCHA format. 10 challenges using original GIFs, each presenting 4 scrambled events for chronological ordering. Drag-and-drop + arrow button reordering (mobile touch support), Kendall tau distance scoring (0-100%) for partial credit, per-challenge AI analysis (why frame-by-frame processing fails at temporal sequencing), research context on temporal CAPTCHAs as next-gen verification, results dashboard with per-challenge score bars and breakdown, Fisher-Yates shuffle, re-shuffle/skip options, 70 new tests (256 total)

Response Time Benchmark -- timed CAPTCHA solving with ms-precision timer, per-challenge analytics, 6 summary stat cards (avg/median/fastest/slowest/accuracy/total), Canvas bar chart with median line, AI speed comparison (5 models with accuracy labels), difficulty ranking by response time, research insights. formatTime/speedClass/calcStats utilities. CSP/ARIA/responsive. 61 new tests

Cognitive Load Analyzer — 6-dimension CAPTCHA complexity analysis (Visual Processing, Temporal Reasoning, Cultural Context, Humor/Irony, Spatial Awareness, Narrative Comprehension). Per-CAPTCHA cognitive fingerprint radar charts, distribution bar chart, Human vs AI radar overlay, AI capability gap table with ranking, auto-generated research insights, sort controls (ID/load/visual/temporal). AI model based on GPT-4o 2025. 55 new tests.
everything: Event creation/edit dialog — bottom sheet form with title, description, date/time picker, 4 color-coded priority levels (low/medium/high/urgent), event detail screen with colored header, edit/delete from list and detail views, priority color strip on cards, DB migration v1→v2

Search, filter & sort — collapsible search bar (title/description), priority filter chips with event counts, 6 sort options (date/priority/title asc/desc), results info bar with clear-all, animated filter toggle with badge, 'no matching events' empty state

Event analytics dashboard — overview cards (total/upcoming/today/this week), priority distribution bar chart, busiest-day-of-week chart, monthly timeline, smart insights (urgent alerts, next event countdown, events-per-week average, most common priority, overdue follow-ups), pure Flutter widgets, zero dependencies

Event tags/categories — EventTag model (8-color palette, 8 presets: Work/Personal/Meeting/Birthday/Health/Travel/Finance/Social), custom tags with name + color picker, tag chips on cards and detail screen, tag filter chips in filter bar, tag distribution chart in analytics, DB migration v2→v3, 30 new tests

Recurring events — RecurrenceRule model (daily/weekly/monthly/yearly frequency, configurable interval 1-12, optional end date, month-end clamping for edge cases like Jan 31→Feb 28). Event form Repeat toggle with frequency/interval dropdowns, end date picker, live summary. Event card blue recurrence badge. Detail screen recurrence card with rule summary and next 3 occurrence dates preview. generateOccurrences() for derived EventModel instances. DB migration v3→v4, 45 new tests

Calendar View — month-grid calendar with event dots and day detail. CalendarScreen with month navigation (chevron buttons, Today jump-back), event indicator dots color-coded by highest priority, event count badges on busy days (3+), current day indigo circle, selected day highlight with event list below. Tap a day to see events in bottom sheet (time, title, tags, priority bar, recurrence indicator). Quick add from calendar pre-fills selected day. O(1) event grouping by day, pure Flutter widgets, zero dependencies. Calendar icon in home app bar, 42 new tests

ICS/iCal Event Export — RFC 5545-compliant iCalendar export for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook interop. IcsExportService: exportEvent/exportEvents (VCALENDAR + VEVENT), DTSTART/DTEND, SUMMARY, DESCRIPTION (tags + priority), PRIORITY (RFC mapping), CATEGORIES, RRULE from RecurrenceRule, RFC 5545 text escaping + line folding at 75 octets, filename generation, bytes export. EventDetailScreen share button via share_plus + path_provider. 52 new tests

Event Reminders — ReminderOffset enum (9 intervals: atTime/5m/15m/30m/1h/2h/1d/2d/1w), ReminderSettings model (add/remove/toggle, sorted, no-dupe, notificationTimes, nextNotificationTime, summary, JSON serialization). EventModel integration (reminders field, fromJson/toJson, copyWith, equality). DB migration v4->v5. 57 new tests.

Event Templates � EventTemplate model with 10 built-in presets (Meeting/Birthday/Doctor/Workout/Standup/Lunch/Travel/Deadline/Social/Focus Time), createEvent/fromEvent/copyWith, JSON serialization. TemplateService with CRUD, search, reorder, persistence (SharedPreferences), max 50 custom, built-in protection. 55 new tests.

Event Checklist (Subtasks) � ChecklistItem (title, note, completed, completedAt, toggleCompleted, copyWith, JSON round-trip) + EventChecklist (ordered items, max 50, addItem/removeItem/updateItem/toggleItem/reorderItem, completeAll/uncompleteAll/clearCompleted, progress/completedCount/pendingCount/isAllCompleted, progressText/shortProgress, toJsonString/fromJsonString with null/malformed safety). EventModel integration (checklist field, fromJson/toJson/copyWith/equality/hashCode). DB migration v5?v6. 57 new tests.
getagentbox: Interactive chat demo — 4 animated conversation scenarios (Memory, Search, Reminder, Image) with Telegram-style chat window, typing indicator, bubble animations, scenario tabs, auto-play on load, zero dependencies

Comparison table + FAQ accordion — comparison table (AgentBox vs ChatGPT vs Siri/Google, 9 features with check/cross/partial indicators, highlighted AgentBox column), FAQ accordion (7 questions covering pricing/install/memory/privacy/model/use cases/groups, smooth expand/collapse, one-at-a-time)

Pricing section — 3-tier pricing (Free $0/Pro $9/Team $29), monthly/yearly billing toggle with 20% yearly discount, animated toggle switch with keyboard accessibility, ARIA role=switch, popular tag on Pro, per-plan feature lists, responsive grid (3-col to stacked), 8 new tests (66 total)

Testimonials carousel — 6 testimonial cards with star ratings, user quotes, avatar initials, and roles. Auto-rotating (5s interval, pauses on hover), prev/next arrows, clickable dot navigation, CSS transitions, wrapping navigation, ARIA labels, Testimonials module, 34 new tests (100 total)

How It Works step-by-step guide — 3-step visual guide (Open Telegram → Hit Start → It gets smarter) with numbered gradient circles, emoji icons, connecting gradient line, step cards with hover effect, IntersectionObserver scroll-triggered entrance animation (staggered fade+slide, fallback for older browsers), HowItWorks module (init/reset/revealSteps/isRevealed), aria-hidden decorative line, 13 new tests (113 total)

Social Proof Stats -- animated counter section with scroll-triggered count-up animation. 4 stat cards (Messages 10K+, Users 500+, Uptime 99.9%, Response <2s). Ease-out cubic easing, gradient text effect on completion, IntersectionObserver with fallback, formatNumber with comma separators, responsive 2-col grid, ARIA labels. Stats module with init/reset/animateAll/animateCard API. 44 new tests (142 total)

Use Cases Section � tabbed persona showcase (Developer/Professional/Student/Personal). UseCases module with switchTo/getCurrent/getTabs/init. Full keyboard nav (arrows, Home/End, roving tabindex). ARIA roles (tablist/tab/tabpanel). Click + keyboard delegation with data-bound guard. Fade-in animation + reduced motion support. 42 new tests (211 total).
WinSentinel: CLI audit history, comparison & diff — --history command to view past audit runs in color-coded table with sparkline trends, --compare for side-by-side module-level comparison of latest two runs, --diff for git-style new/resolved findings diff. Options: --days (lookback), --limit (display count), --json + -o (export). 26 new tests (192 total)

Markdown report export — --markdown/--md CLI flag for GitHub-flavored Markdown output. Score overview with text progress bar and grade emoji, summary stats table, module breakdown table, detailed findings with severity labels/remediation/fix commands, collapsible passed checks and info sections (<details>), score trend table with change indicators, ReportFormat.Markdown enum, GenerateMarkdownReport() with optional trend data, SaveReport/GenerateFilename support for .md. 32 new tests (144 total for CLI+report)

Security Baseline Snapshots — --baseline save/list/check/delete for named security state snapshots. Save current audit as baseline, check later for regressions/improvements/deviations. Score comparison, per-module deviation table, regression/resolved findings with severity coloring, overall pass/fail verdict. JSON file storage, --force overwrite, --desc, --json output, exit codes for CI/CD gating, name validation. 6 model classes (SecurityBaseline, BaselineCheckResult, etc.), BaselineService with full CRUD, 38 new baseline tests + 22 CLI parser tests (123 total in filter)

Remediation Checklist — --checklist CLI command for prioritized hardening plan. RemediationPlanner service classifies findings into Quick Wins (⚡ auto-fix or simple settings, <5 min), Medium Effort (🔧 manual investigation, 5-30 min), Major Changes (🏗️ installations/policy changes, 30+ min). Priority scoring (severity×weight + auto-fix bonus + effort multiplier + remediation bonus), heuristic effort classification from remediation text, projected score calculation, step numbering, estimated times. Color-coded console output with per-item details (impact points, time, category, fix command). JSON output, module filtering, quiet mode. 47 new RemediationPlanner tests + 5 CLI parser tests (52 total new tests)

Security Compliance Profiles — 4 built-in profiles (Home/Developer/Enterprise/Server) for context-aware audit scoring. ComplianceProfile model with severity overrides, module weight multipliers (0.0-2.0), skipped modules, compliance thresholds (60/70/85/90), profile-specific recommendations. ComplianceProfileService with ApplyProfile() weighted average scoring, case-insensitive override matching, per-module tracking. Home: downgrades SMB/LLMNR/audit to Info, reduces Event Log/Encryption/Process weight. Enterprise: upgrades SMB/BitLocker/Audit/LLMNR to Critical, increases Firewall/Updates/Accounts/Encryption/EventLog weight. Server: maximum strictness, most findings Critical, all modules 1.3-1.5x. CLI: --profiles list command, --profile/-p <name> flag for audit/score, compliance result display (verdict/overrides/weights/recommendations), JSON output. 55 new ComplianceProfileService tests + 14 new CLI parser tests (69 total new tests)

Finding Ignore/Suppress Rules — --ignore add/list/remove/clear/purge for managing finding suppression rules. IgnoreRule model (pattern + match mode exact/contains/regex, module filter, severity filter, reason, expiration). IgnoreRuleService with JSON file persistence, CRUD, ApplyRules() and ApplyRulesToReport() for filtering findings and recalculating scores, IsIgnored(), GetRuleMatchCounts(), PurgeExpiredRules(). CLI: --ignore add <pattern> with --match-mode, --ignore-module, --ignore-severity, --ignore-reason, --expire-days; --ignore list/remove/clear/purge; --show-ignored flag on --audit to reveal suppressed findings. Automatic score recalculation, rule enable/disable toggle, full JSON output. 45 new IgnoreRuleService tests + 14 new CLI parser tests (59 total new tests)

Score Trend Analysis — TrendAnalyzer service (linear regression, statistics, streaks, distribution, alerts, sparkline/bar chart), --trend CLI command (--trend-days, --alert-below, --trend-modules, JSON output, exit code 2 on critical alerts), colored console output (sparkline, stats tree, histogram, streaks, findings, modules, alerts). 29 new tests. 479 total passing.

SARIF v2.1.0 Export - OASIS standard for security tool output. Full schema compliance, severity mapping (Critical->error, Warning->warning, Info->note, Pass->none), deduplicated rule definitions with help text, logical locations, fix suggestions with commands, invocation metadata, module error notifications, automation details, pass filtering (--sarif-include-pass), stable rule ID generation with 24 category codes. CLI flags: --sarif, --sarif-include-pass. 73 new tests.
